body: Newtone splits a monophonic recording into discrete notes on a piano-roll-style grid. Dragging a note moves its pitch; editing the contour line inside a note reshapes vibrato and drift without hard-tuning the whole phrase, so corrections can stay natural.

Formant shifting changes vocal timbre independently of pitch (useful for gender/character tweaks), while transition control smooths the slides between adjacent notes. Global Center and Variation knobs apply a quick overall tuning pass before manual edits.
